{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Relic Infobox|Circlet|2}}{{R|Circlet||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} that is obtained when all other [[Slay the Spire 2:Relics|Relics]] have been collected. 

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained if all other relics that could spawn in a situation are within your possession.
